creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I think the kernel change is wrong for a debugger.  The parent should not see the pid and need pdwait(), but a debugger like truss should be able to see them.  There is a question if this means that a process that can't use fork can use pdfork() and then ptrace(PT_TRACE_ME) in the child and be able to obtain the pid via wait(P_ALL) in the parent, but if you're blocking fork() but not ptrace() that may be what you are stuck with.
